name: telegram-channel-chatgpt-cloudflare
description: A private Cloudflare-hosted MCP bridge between ChatGPT and one Telegram channel or chat.

interface.shortDescription: Read and manage one Telegram channel from ChatGPT.
interface.longDescription: Connects ChatGPT to a single allow-listed Telegram channel or chat through a dedicated bot. It archives new messages in Cloudflare D1, searches them, publishes posts, edits posts, and deletes a post only after explicit confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Draft and publish a Telegram post.
Search Telegram messages for an order.
